/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/common/SqlText.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/database/DatabaseFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/database/SQLiteDatabase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/database/PostgresDatabase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/schema/SQLiteSchemaProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/schema/PostgresSchemaProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/core/async/QueryExecutionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/ui/AppTheme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/ui/QueryEditorPane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/ui/SchemaExplorerPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/ui/ResultGridPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sqlgui.dir/ui/MainWindow.cpp.o -o sqlgui  libimgui_docking.a /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL
